mapper.sql: BUYER_ID , BUYER_NAME , BUYER_BANK , BUYER_BANKNO , BUYER_BANKNAME , BUYER_ZIP , BUYER_ADD1 , BUYER_ADD2 , BUYER_COMTEL , BUYER_FAX , BUYER_MAIL , BUYER_CHARGER , BUYER_TELEXT
mapper.select:
SELECT
, LPROD_ID "lprod.lprodId" , LPROD_GU "lprod.lprodGu" , LPROD_NAME "lprod.lprodName" FROM BUYER NATURAL JOIN LPROD

WITH BUYERVIEW AS ( SELECT
, LPROD_ID "lprod.lprodId" , LPROD_GU "lprod.lprodGu" , LPROD_NAME "lprod.lprodName" FROM BUYER NATURAL JOIN LPROD WHERE BUYER_ID = #{buyerId} ) SELECT B.* , PROD_ID , PROD_NAME , PROD_COST , PROD_PRICE , PROD_SALE FROM BUYERVIEW B LEFT OUTER JOIN PROD P ON (B.BUYER_ID = P.BUYER_ID)
mapper.insert:
SELECT #{lprodGu}||LPAD(NVL(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(MAX(buyer_id),5)),0)+1, 2, '0') FROM BUYER WHERE LPROD_GU = #{lprodGu}
INSERT INTO BUYER ( BUYER_ID, BUYER_NAME, LPROD_GU, BUYER_BANK, BUYER_BANKNO, BUYER_BANKNAME, BUYER_ZIP, BUYER_ADD1, BUYER_ADD2, BUYER_COMTEL, BUYER_FAX, BUYER_MAIL, BUYER_CHARGER ) VALUES ( #{buyerId}, #{buyerName}, #{lprodGu}, #{buyerBank}, #{buyerBankno}, #{buyerBankname}, #{buyerZip}, #{buyerAdd1}, #{buyerAdd2}, #{buyerComtel}, #{buyerFax}, #{buyerMail}, #{buyerCharger} )
